description: Minimal GU v1 geometry: 4D observerse (Y, dim=14) over 4D base spacetime (X, dim=4)

baseMesh.description: Minimal 4D simplicial mesh: 2 pentatopes (4-simplices) sharing a tetrahedron face. 6 vertices in R^4.

ambientMesh.description: 14D ambient mesh with 2 fiber points per X vertex (dim(Y)=14, fiber dim=10)

notes: Minimal 4D example for the physical dimension dim(X)=4, dim(Y)=14. Uses su(2) gauge group with identity Shiab. Suitable for end-to-end validation at the target dimension.
